title: Universal Kāraka Protocol v1.0.0
description: Domain-agnostic intermediate representation for the Brahman Verification Kernel. Every problem — Sanskrit, cybersecurity, molecular chemistry, smart contracts — must be translated into this structure before hitting the Verifier.

protocol_version.description: Semantic version of the Kāraka Protocol.

claim.description: The proposition being verified — the statement the neural translator extracted from raw input.

raw_input.description: The original unprocessed input (sentence, code snippet, molecular formula, etc.).

claim_type.description: The logical form of the claim.

confidence.description: Neural translator's confidence in the extraction.

karaka_graph.description: The universal semantic graph. Every domain maps to exactly these six roles.

kriya.description: The ACTION — the central verb/operation/transformation. Everything else orbits this.

surface.description: The raw token as it appeared in input.

resolved_root.description: The canonical root form from the Sūtra cartridge DB. null = DB miss → AMBIGUOUS.

root_class.description: Classification within the domain (e.g., gaṇa for Sanskrit, opcode class for Solidity).

karta.description: The AGENT — who/what initiates the action.

constraints.description: Domain-specific constraints on this agent (e.g., must be animate, must have admin role).

karma.description: The TARGET — what is being acted upon.

karana.description: The INSTRUMENT — the mechanism, tool, or energy used to perform the action.

sampradana.description: The RECIPIENT — the beneficiary or destination of the action.

adhikarana.description: The ENVIRONMENT — the boundary conditions, context, or locus where the action occurs.

apadana.description: The SOURCE — the origin point from which something separates.

sutra_cartridge.description: File path or URI of the loaded domain Sūtra cartridge.

translator_model.description: The neural model that produced this KP instance.

source_hash.description: SHA-256 of the raw_input for tamper detection.

constraint.description: A single verification rule that the Verifier checks against the Sūtra cartridge.

rule_id.description: The Sūtra ID from the loaded cartridge.

check.description: Human-readable description of what is being verified.

expected.description: The legal value(s) according to the Sūtra.

actual.description: The value found in the input.
